title: KJ's Skill Tree
description: A pufferfish skill tree created for KJ's Progression Pack. Implements tool progression and 3 different combat classes.
body:
Adds two skill trees using Pufferfish Skill Trees, Pufferfish Attributes, Advanced Netherite, and KJ's Progression Limiter to heavily extend vanilla progression.

The combat tree provides ways of building into many different playstyles, however it makes the player very strong compared to vanilla mobs. It is heavily recommended to add a difficulty mod to scale the mobs to the player. 

The gathering tree extends vanilla progression by requiring players to unlock tools as they go, as well as providing significant buffs to mining speed, fortune, and reducing anvil repair costs.
